name: transcription-playwright
description: Playwright test automation for Solibra transcription frontend

scripts.test:headed: set SLOW_MO_MS=350&& set STEP_PAUSE_MS=1500&& playwright test --headed
scripts.test:full:headed: set SLOW_MO_MS=350&& set STEP_PAUSE_MS=1500&& playwright test tests/specs --project=standalone --headed
scripts.test:dev:full:headed: set TEST_ENV=dev&& set SLOW_MO_MS=350&& set STEP_PAUSE_MS=1500&& playwright test tests/specs --project=standalone --headed
scripts.test:staging:full:headed: set TEST_ENV=staging&& set SLOW_MO_MS=350&& set STEP_PAUSE_MS=1500&& playwright test tests/specs --project=standalone --headed
scripts.test:05-17: playwright test tests/specs/05-assignFile.spec.ts tests/specs/06-openAssignment.spec.ts tests/specs/07-editSegment.spec.ts tests/specs/08-splitSegment.spec.ts tests/specs/09-mergePreviousSegment.spec.ts tests/specs/10-mergeNextSegment.spec.ts tests/specs/11-insertSegment.spec.ts tests/specs/12-deleteSegment.spec.ts tests/specs/13-updateMetadata.spec.ts tests/specs/14-submitReview.spec.ts tests/specs/15-managerApprove.spec.ts tests/specs/16-managerReject.spec.ts tests/specs/17-cleanup.spec.ts --project=standalone
